scripts.build: pnpm --filter @light80/core build && pnpm --filter @light80/game-sdk build && pnpm --filter signal-server build && pnpm --filter web-portal build && pnpm --filter pixel-invaders build && pnpm --filter tunnel-invaders build && pnpm --filter fog-of-time-false-horizons build
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter @light80/core lint && pnpm --filter @light80/game-sdk lint && pnpm --filter signal-server lint && pnpm --filter web-portal lint && pnpm --filter pixel-invaders lint && pnpm --filter tunnel-invaders lint && pnpm --filter fog-of-time-false-horizons lint
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @light80/core test && pnpm --filter @light80/game-sdk test && pnpm --filter signal-server test && pnpm --filter web-portal test && pnpm --filter pixel-invaders test && pnpm --filter tunnel-invaders test && pnpm --filter fog-of-time-false-horizons test
